1.title: Node.js: Active handles
1.query:
timeseries active_handles = avg(dt.runtime.nodejs.eventloop.active_handles),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(active_handles) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Node.js: Event loop utilization
2.query:
timeseries utilization = avg(dt.runtime.nodejs.eventloop.utilization),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(utilization) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Node.js: V8 heap total
3.query:
timeseries total = avg(dt.runtime.nodejs.memory.total),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(total) desc
| limit 20

4.title: Node.js: V8 heap used
4.query:
timeseries used = avg(dt.runtime.nodejs.memory.used),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(used) desc
| limit 20
